name: PAD Aviation Technics GmbH
message: PAD Aviation Technics GmbH (founded in 2012) offers a wide range of services on, Airbus A320 Family CEO & NEO, BOEING 737 CL, NG & MAX and Bombardier Dash 8-Q400 aircraft covering all aspects of line & base maintenance in conjunction with a modern hangar facility. PAD Aviation Technics GmbH corporate office is located in Flughafenstrasse 33 D-33142 Büren-Ahden Germany.
